content: Kaleaido + Timeless, does that mean no new Awaker on October 6th?

That's what I thought 
Plus Light saying on his last post that they want to refocus on the story and what they want instead of new awaker made me realize we might have no new Awaker until gmurphy for the 2nd Anni
And this is maybe confirmed by those 2 banners as you mentioned

I doubt we are looking at a full month without release after Pickman, but who knows ;-;
-# Also W Waguri pp

守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于<t:1759229400:F>进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2025年10月14日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
一、相位对弈
● 唤醒体-萝坦：狂气爆发「混沌之兽」：移除了获得力量的效果。
● 命轮-渴求的画笔：算力消耗由 3 提高到 5。
● 钥令-玫瑰的胜利：获得的屏障由 3 降低为 2，效果持续回合由 3 减少为 2。
 
二、问题修复
● 修复了「黑羽」在「相位对弈」中部分情况下仍视为「打击」的问题。
● 修复了「调查结算」界面中唤醒体头像周围出现边缘白框的问题。

**V2.3.3.1 Online Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on <t:1759229400:F> . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
 
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50
 
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on October 14, 2025 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
 
[Update Content]
1. Traphase
● Awakener - Lotan: Exalt "Beast of Chaos": Removed the effect of gaining Strength.
● Wheel of Destiny - Thirsting Brush: Arithmetica cost increased from 3 to 5.
● Posse - Victory of Roses: The Barrier gained is reduced from 3 to 2, and the effect duration is reduced from 3 turns to 2.
 
2.Bug Fix
● Fixed the issue where "Onyx Plume" was still considered as "Strike" in some cases in "Traphase".
● Fixed the issue of a white border appearing around the Awakener avatar in the "Investigation Settlement" interface.
